title: Aliasing, Effective Type, Provenance, and Type Punning · Object-Lifetime Lens: Effective Type Access
summary: A high-performance decoder casts byte storage into structures and changes output only under optimization. Planned artifact: Add and verify the cmem effective type access increment in defined binary decoder with provenance notes. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Access allocated and copied storage through types permitted by effective-type rules or defined character-byte paths.
Use empty initialization and reviewed C23 facilities where supported while preserving explicit invariants and fallback tests.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Predict Effective Type Access · Theory Effective Type Access
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory native-systems team handles memory case 5259. Produce bounded C evidence to decode representation bytes through a defined copy; change the size, lifetime, failure, or ownership condition; print the observed result and invariant. Instant code stays inside the PicoC practice subset. C23 syntax, current GCC and Clang, optimization, ABI, threads, sanitizers, analyzers, fuzzers, operating-system resources, foreign runtimes, load, and production behavior require named controlled transfer gates.
